classObjective: Determine the five-number summary and construct a box plot from a data set.
warmUp: What are the five numbers in the five-number summary?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: IQR calculation; standard deviation concept; constructing box plots from five-number summaries
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice constructing box plots and calculating standard deviation
independentPractice: Practice problems constructing box plots and calculating spread measures
assessment: Exit ticket: construct a box plot from a data set and identify any outliers
capReflection: What does standard deviation tell you about a data set that range and IQR do not?
